name: Amala Yoga Outcome — Stable Untarnished Fame
description: When Amala Yoga (benefic in 10th from Moon) is present, the fame quality is stable, ethical, and scandal-free. Public reputation remains untarnished throughout life.

source_text.quote: Amala Yoga produces fame that is spotless (amala), earned through righteous conduct and charitable deeds.

all_of: Amala Yoga is present (benefic in 10th from Moon or Lagna)
none_of: Malefics conjoin or aspect the 10th house benefic

interpretation.meaning: Fame quality: STABLE. The native's public image remains positive throughout life. Scandals do not stick. Recovery from reputation damage is swift.

metadata.notes: Quality classifier: stable fame. Presence of Amala Yoga protects reputation even during difficult transits.

name: Sun-Venus-Rahu Charisma Outcome — Magnetic but Volatile Fame
description: Sun-Venus-Rahu combination gives extraordinary charisma and mass appeal but with potential for scandal, controversy, and sudden reputation swings.

source_text.quote: The combination of Sun, Venus, and Rahu gives fame that is magnetic yet volatile — the masses are drawn but controversy follows.

all_of: Sun, Venus, and Rahu are mutually connected (conjunction/aspect/sign)

interpretation.meaning: Fame quality: CHARISMATIC. Extraordinary personal magnetism draws masses, but Rahu's shadow creates volatility — sudden fame peaks followed by controversy or scandal.

metadata.notes: Quality classifier: charismatic but volatile. Common in film stars, rock stars, and controversial public figures.

name: Ascendant Lord Weak/Afflicted — Fame Blocked (Obscurity Risk)
description: When the ascendant lord is debilitated, combust, or in 6/8/12 without benefic aspect, the native struggles with obscurity despite other fame indicators.

source_text.quote: If the lord of the Lagna is weak, afflicted, or placed in dusthana without relief, the native remains unknown despite their qualities.

all_of: Ascendant lord is debilitated, combust, or placed in 6th/8th/12th house
none_of: Ascendant lord receives aspect from Jupiter or Venus (neecha bhanga)

interpretation.meaning: Fame quality: BLOCKED/OBSCURE. Despite talent and effort, public recognition is delayed or denied. The native works behind the scenes. Fame comes late or posthumously.

metadata.notes: Quality classifier: fame blocked. Reduces confidence of all fame windows. May indicate posthumous fame.

name: Sun in 10th Outcome — Political/Government Fame Mode
description: Sun in 10th classifies the fame mode as political/governmental. Recognition comes through authority, institutional leadership, and government honors.

source_text.quote: Sun in the 10th makes the native a leader among men, famous through governance, and honored by the state.

all_of: Sun is in the 10th house from Lagna

interpretation.meaning: Fame mode: POLITICAL. The native's recognition path is through government, institutional authority, and formal leadership roles. Padma Shri, national awards, political office.

metadata.notes: Mode classifier: political fame. Channels fame energy toward government/institutional recognition.

name: Venus in 10th Outcome — Artistic/Creative Fame Mode
description: Venus in the 10th house classifies fame mode as artistic/creative. Recognition comes through beauty, art, music, entertainment, or aesthetic achievements.

source_text.quote: Venus in the 10th makes the native famous through artistic pursuits, beautiful creations, and entertainment of the public.

all_of: Venus is in the 10th house from Lagna OR Venus is the 10th lord

interpretation.meaning: Fame mode: ARTISTIC. The native's recognition path is through creative arts, beauty, entertainment, music, or aesthetic achievement. Film awards, music honors, art exhibitions.

metadata.notes: Mode classifier: artistic fame. Channels fame energy toward creative/entertainment recognition.

name: 10th Lord Benefic-Aspected Outcome — Formal Honor & Awards
description: When the 10th lord receives benefic aspects (especially Jupiter), the fame quality includes formal honors, awards, titles, and institutional recognition.

source_text.quote: The 10th lord aspected by Jupiter gives honors from the state, awards, and titles of distinction.

all_of: 10th lord receives aspect from Jupiter or is conjoined with Jupiter

interpretation.meaning: Fame quality: FORMAL HONORS. The native receives titles, awards, Padma awards, honorary degrees, and formal institutional recognition. Jupiter blesses the 10th lord with dharmic honor.

metadata.notes: Quality classifier: formal honor. The native receives institutional recognition, not just public popularity.

name: Vargottama Moon Outcome — International Scale Fame
description: Vargottama Moon classifies the fame scale as international. The native's appeal transcends geographical and cultural boundaries.

source_text.quote: Vargottama Moon gives fame that crosses borders and is recognized in lands far from birth.

all_of: Moon is Vargottama (same sign in Rasi and Navamsa)

interpretation.meaning: Fame scale: INTERNATIONAL. The native's recognition is not confined to their country of birth. Cross-cultural appeal, international awards, global audience.

metadata.notes: Scale classifier: international. The fame is not limited to birth country.

name: Chandra-Mangala (Moon-Mars) Outcome — Controversial Fame
description: Moon-Mars conjunction or opposition creates Chandra-Mangala Yoga which gives fame through controversy, bold action, or provocative public statements.

source_text.quote: Moon and Mars in conjunction or opposition give wealth through questionable means and fame that carries controversy.

all_of: Moon and Mars are in conjunction (same house) or mutual aspect (opposition)

interpretation.meaning: Fame quality: CONTROVERSIAL. The native becomes famous through bold, sometimes provocative actions. Media controversies, public feuds, and dramatic statements mark the fame journey.

metadata.notes: Quality classifier: controversial fame. Common in activists, provocateurs, and bold political figures.

name: Rahu in 10th Outcome — Secret Influence & Unconventional Fame
description: Rahu in the 10th house gives fame through unconventional means, behind-the-scenes power, or breaking traditional boundaries in career.

source_text.quote: Rahu in the 10th gives mastery through unconventional methods, fame in foreign lands or through breaking boundaries of tradition.

all_of: Rahu is placed in the 10th house from Lagna

interpretation.meaning: Fame mode: SECRET/UNCONVENTIONAL. The native gains influence through non-traditional paths — technology, foreign connections, breaking social norms. May operate with power that is not publicly visible.

metadata.notes: Mode classifier: unconventional. Tech founders, foreign-market disruptors, and behind-the-scenes power brokers.
